rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same material scope problem — premature Layer‑5/6 stubs (ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup with True fields, IsUnipotent) bundled with Layer‑0 foundations — and both recommend removing the stubs to produce a focused foundations‑only PR. The sole difference is Review 2's additional demand to unbundle AffineAlgGroup, which hinges on a roadmap directive (README line 247) that cannot be verified from the diff; without that verification, it may be a helpful design correction or an unnecessary churn demand, so the resulting PRs are equally good.
